title: Iseyon Analytics Partners with Databricks to Drive Business Value with the Lakehouse Platform
shortDescription: Iseyon Analytics, announces partnership with Databricks, the data and AI company, to drive business value by unifying data and artificial intelligence (AI).
description:
Iseyon Analytics, announces partnership with Databricks, the data and AI company, to drive business value by unifying data and artificial intelligence (AI).

Our consulting company partners with Databricks to leverage the full potential of data and AI, enabling businesses to drive significant value. In our pursuit to be on the leading edge of technology using the best tools, we’ve committed to building out our environment on the Databricks database platform so we can provide our customers with the help and support they need using the latest technologies.

Databricks’ Lakehouse Platform helps organizations accelerate innovation by unifying data teams with an open, scalable platform for all of their data-driven use cases. From streaming analytics and AI to business intelligence (BI), Databricks provides a modern lakehouse architecture that unifies data engineering, data science, machine learning and analytics within a single collaborative platform.
author: Jessica Wernoch
